case_title: WALTER UMANA ET AL VS. MICHAEL CASSIDY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,263.00 FILED BY UMANA, WALTER UMANA, RONALD AS TO DEFENDANT CASSIDY, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT CASSIDY, MICHAEL AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT UMANA, RONALD
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT CASSIDY, MICHAEL AS TO PLAINTIFF UMANA, WALTER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED FEB-04-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CASSIDY, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-07-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 ON CROSS DEFENDANT RONALD UMANA ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. 1 PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WALTER UMANA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT RONALD UMANA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT MICHAEL CASSIDY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PLAINTIFF WALTER UMANA TO BRING HIS OWN SPANISH INTERPRETER. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: DEFENDANT'S CLAIM MAILED CERTIFIED TO RONALD UMANA IS RETURNED - RETURN TO SENDER, UNCLAIMED, UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-07-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 ON CROSS DEFENDANT RONALD UMANA ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. 1 PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WALTER UMANA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT RONALD UMANA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT MICHAEL CASSIDY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WALTER UMANA TO BRING HIS OWN SPANISH INTERPRETER. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. CROSS--DEFENDANT ROLAND UMANA WAIVES SERVICE ON THE CROSS--COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFFS WERE ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---CARLOS MARTINEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

"THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT'S CLAIM IS BARRED--RES JUDICATA BY WAY OF CSM-14-847980, BY JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT.
